title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 16–18, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So don't give me any lip about it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I DON'T GET IT! NO PIRATE WOULD SACRIFICE HIMSELF TO SAVE A FRIEND!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: IMPOSIBLE! It's an iron cage! It took five of us to move it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IF ONLY I COULD GET OUT OF THIS CAGE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NOW WE GOTTA FINISH WHAT WE STARTED.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Those three are trying to make a fool of me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: CLEARLY WE'RE NOT DEALING WITH COMMON THIEVES!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Consider this a Declaration of War!!!

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
